Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Prabhupada talk at iskconmedia [mp3]

Other · asked by user [] · 2008-08-09 · 4 answers
We are having a ratha yatra here in Malaysia. I would like to know if i could download prabhupadas mp3 burned in on a CD and distribute it to devotees at CD price since not everyone here have high speed internet or know how on downloading etc?

Let me know on this. thank. hare krishna,
user [1] · 2008-08-09
it would be better if you give them for free if someone just buys the cds.
user [315] · 2008-08-09
Hare Krishna prabhu,

That is a better idea. I will be giving the talk CD as you have suggested. This is the first time i am starting to do some charity work. I do not want to be involved in copyright infringement with BBT as previously my request for offline vedabase which could be downloaded from their site at http://vedabase.net/offline/ is charged with a fee. Eventhough i have requested that it would be distributed free to those who do not have broadband or internet connection available

I would like to confirm if there are any copyright rules that follows on this. I would be happy to print out a copy and insert into the CD so people know I am not selling unauthorized CD.

Could i use some of the pictures from your website at http://www.iskconmedia.com/photos/ for distribution in Cd as well?

Kindly advise

Thank you again for your help.
user [38] · 2008-08-10
> offline vedabase which could be downloaded from their site at http://vedabase.net/offline/

14 MB? The whole Vedabase has over 500 MB.
user [315] · 2008-08-10
Dear Veda,

Thank you for pointing out the discrepancy. i will do some search and check on the net.

Admin,
I will distribute these CD free of charge and if people donate than it will go to the temple. Thank you. If there are any other issue, kindly inform.

thanks
